recentTweets.text:
Tomorrow is Columbus Day. 

Not indigenous people’s day. 
Not Italian-American heritage day.

Columbus Day.
I stand with Erika 💪 https://t.co/GeplnfrhJS
Uh oh... https://t.co/lbgbfu4l1F

Pete Buttigieg will leave his post as Transportation Secretary having spent $7.5 BILLION to build 8 EV charging stations.

His legacy will be squandering billions on something nobody wants, while millions struggle to afford the things they need. https://t.co/iIQzvkPfTJ

Trump chose not to pursue charges against Hillary because he wanted to unite the country.

Don't expect him to be so kind in his second term.
 
Joe Biden and Alvin Bragg just changed the game. We are at war.

Iowa voted on paper ballots.
They counted every vote on television and posted results on election night. 
And guess what happened?
Trump won.

On top of a $174,000 annual salary, members of Congress will now have their rent, utilities, and meals paid for by the taxpayers.

Politicians shouldn't be able to insulate themselves from the inflation they caused and then stick taxpayers with the bill.
The House has spent more time debating the speaker’s race than they spent debating sending $100 BILLION to Ukraine with zero oversight.
The people who want to take your guns are the same people who just released a Russian arms dealer who sold weapons to Al Qaeda.

Elon’s Twitter will be a safe space.

For free speech.

We don’t need more foreign oil. 
We need more AMERICAN oil.
If our government can afford to send billions to Ukraine without blinking an eye, then our taxes are way too high.
Congress wouldn’t allow an inspector general to keep track of the billions of dollars they sent to Ukraine, but they’ll hire 87,000 IRS agents to keep track of your Venmo transactions.
When the IRS comes to shake you down, remember the names of the politicians who voted to send them to your door.
America is suffering from a shortage of liberty, not a shortage of IRS agents.

Democrats in DC want to hire 86,000 more IRS agents. 

That’s 86,000 too many.
The Chinese Communist Party has no right to buy land in the United States of America.
I wish people in Washington DC would care about American citizens as much as they care about Ukraine.

Biden says $5 gas is here to stay and Americans will have to suck it up for “as long as it takes.”

When was the last time Joe Biden paid for his own gasoline?
Constitutional rights don’t require permission.
Why should America beg Saudi Arabia for more oil when we have the largest oil reserves on earth right beneath our feet?
The Keystone XL Pipeline would be delivering over 800,000 barrels of oil PER DAY if it had been built.
This is the government the founders were concerned about when they wrote the Second Amendment.

Did Putin cancel new oil and gas leases in Alaska and the Gulf?

Did Putin cancel the Keystone XL Pipeline?

Nope. Joe Biden did that.
Don’t praise the government for solving a problem it created.
No more borrowing money from China to send to Ukraine.
I’m far more worried about members of Congress buying stocks than I am about Elon Musk buying Twitter.
The American people did not elect the CDC to run their lives.
Ballot harvesting should be a felony.
When the regime doesn’t like something, they brand it “disinformation.”
It’s a great day to abolish the IRS.
If Jeff Bezos can own the Washington Post, Elon Musk can own Twitter.
The government hates what it cannot control.
If you need to show a photo ID to buy NyQuil, you can show a photo ID to vote.
America’s energy should come from America.
Joe Biden’s inflation is one of the biggest tax increases in American history.
Sending stimulus checks to combat inflation is like treating a hangover with whiskey.
American tax dollars should go to Americans.
American taxpayers shouldn’t be an ATM for the rest of the world.

Americans can barely afford a tank of gas but our government just passed a trillion-dollar spending bill that spends $40 million on higher education… 

In Egypt.
Congress acted faster to send relief to Ukrainians than they did to send relief to Americans when shut down the economy and locked us in our homes.
Justin Trudeau just showed us exactly why we can never give up our liberty, even temporarily.
Inflation has wiped out the entire value of the stimulus checks you received.
Turn off the money printer. End the Fed.
None of the politicians who put us $30 trillion in debt will be around when it comes time to pay it back.
Lockdowns didn’t save lives, they destroyed them.
American soldiers should not have to fight to defend another nation’s borders.
We aren’t “global citizens,” we are American citizens.

The people shouldn’t fear the government.

The government should fear the people.
Elections without voter ID aren’t fair elections.
America was founded on liberty, not compliance.
Nobody has a right to your financial information without a warrant.
The government shouldn’t be involved in every transaction you make.
Ohio banned Zuckerbucks from our elections, it’s time the rest of the country does too.
Voting is a right reserved for American citizens only.
We don’t tax too little, we spend too much.
Tyranny begins when our government ignores the Constitution.
The government isn’t trying to protect you, it’s trying to control you.
If you give the government emergency powers then there will ALWAYS be an emergency.
Elon Musk would do more good with the $11 billion he’ll pay in taxes than the federal government will.

kurdistanMentions.text:
We don’t need more foreign oil. 
We need more AMERICAN oil.
Why should America beg Saudi Arabia for more oil when we have the largest oil reserves on earth right beneath our feet?
The Keystone XL Pipeline would be delivering over 800,000 barrels of oil PER DAY if it had been built.

Did Putin cancel new oil and gas leases in Alaska and the Gulf?

Did Putin cancel the Keystone XL Pipeline?

Nope. Joe Biden did that.
America’s energy should come from America.
Releasing 3 days worth of supply from the strategic oil reserve can’t undo 11 months of bad energy policy.
Putin gets a pipeline, working Americans get $4 gas.

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 7 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Michael A. Rulli. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 7 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2022-10-06T18:21:50Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.

Cut the IRS, grow freedom.
Constitutional Carry passed the Ohio Senate, I voted YES.
The Bill of Rights is not up for debate, your rights are absolute.
The people who wrote the “Build Back Better” plan have never built anything in their lives.
Liberty is our birthright, not a gift from the government.
6.8% inflation is theft.
Congress needs term limits.
We will NEVER lock down again.
Releasing 3 days worth of supply from the strategic oil reserve can’t undo 11 months of bad energy policy.
You can’t “Build Back Better” if you bankrupt the country.
Get the government OUT of our phones, our bank accounts, and our lives.
As the government gets bigger, our wallets get smaller.
The more corrupt the government is, the more laws they pass.
The LAST thing this country needs is 87,000 more IRS agents.
No one should be snooping in your bank account, especially not the government.
Our rights as Americans don’t come from the government, they come from God.
Americans will disclose their transactions over $600 as soon as every member of Congress discloses theirs.
Whether it’s $600 or $10,000, the IRS has NO business monitoring your bank account.

Food prices at a 10-year high. 

Thanks, Joe Biden.
Great nations learn from their history, they don’t erase it.
Gas prices are at their highest point in 7 years. Working Americans are being hit the hardest by the Biden economy.
If you sacrifice your liberties now, don’t expect to ever get them back.
The government does not own your kids.
Fauci is wrong, there’s never a time to give up your individual rights for the “greater good.”
The Bible is true whether you accept it or not.
Joe Biden’s inflation has given working Americans a 5.4% pay cut this year.
Our nation is $29 trillion in debt, we can’t afford another $3.5 trillion.
The government that’s forcing you to get vaccinated is the same government NEGOTIATING with the Taliban.
This is America, NO vaccine mandates and NO vaccine passports!
117,000 people evacuated out of  Afghanistan by our government, but only 5,400 of those are Americans.
This is the government the founders warned us about.
Who is responsible for billions of dollars worth of American military equipment simply being left behind in Afghanistan?
Putin gets a pipeline, working Americans get $4 gas.
Democrats: vaccine passport to buy groceries, no ID to vote.
Americans will NOT comply with another wave of mandates and lockdowns.
The IRS should be abolished, NOT expanded.
Gas prices haven’t been this high since Joe Biden was Vice President.
We just kicked Mark Zuckerberg and his cash out of Ohio’s elections.
A photo ID should be REQUIRED to vote, it’s common sense.
The only reason someone could be against voter ID is if they’re trying to cheat.
